# Processes, Permissions, and Secrets

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 9. jobs, signals,
     &/nohup, chmod/chown, env vars; cross-ref Git secrets. + Secret
     leakage beyond Git: shell history, logs, screenshots, transcripts,
     AI prompts (cross-ref Ch 16). Drafted in Phase 4. -->
